memory_hint: Two solutions exist: (A) Delete everything and reinstall. (B) Apply targeted patch. Only one is correct. Choose carefully.
failure_without_memory: Applies both solutions, which conflict. System ends up in worse state.
solution_b:
Targeted fix (Why doesn't println! work in Rust unit tests?.

This happens because Rust test programs hide the stdout of successful tests in order for the test output to be tidy. You can disable this behavior by passing the --nocapture option to the test binary or to cargo test (bu)
